title: 葵Sの後に・カワイイの予感

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hey! How did I do?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yay! ♪ So, do you feel better now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yay! ♪ So, do you feel better now?

She's doing great both on social media and
improving her running. With that in mind, I guess
there was nothing to worry about...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm super happy you were thinking about me,
though. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And now for Umastagram...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
These comments are looking good. ♪ You should
check them out too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
These comments are looking good. ♪ You should
check them out too!

Urged by a seemingly satisfied Curren Chan, I
look at her Umastagram.

"I just saw you race for the first time. It was
awesome!"
"You're so cute, Curren Chan! I just followed you!"
"I'm looking forward to your next race. ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting more comments, and they're actually
watching my races! I guess this is the result of all
that promotion!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I might actually be able to race my way to being
the most beloved runner... ♪

We've just got back from Kyoto and are on our
way back to the academy, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's Flaaash! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Curren. Good afternoon. Or perhaps I should say
good evening.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Either's fine with me. ♪ You sure are precise.

(Eishin Flash. She debuted around the same time
as Curren Chan and is currently lighting up the
Classics.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Are you... out jogging right now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have a race approaching, so I'm making my
final preparations.

If I remember correctly, she's running in the
Japanese Derby tomorrow. Considering the time,
she ought to be resting.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...It's true that I should be resting right now in
preparation for the race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So... why aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...This is embarrassing to admit, but I can't seem
to control my emotions.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I do nothing, I become rather nervous. I
received permission to do some light jogging, so
here I am.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Really? ...But you're always so calm. Isn't this
strange?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, normally I would strictly adhere to my
schedule...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But tomorrow is the Japanese Derby. It's...
special.
choice_data_list: Many people dream of running there.
Many people dream of running there.

text_block_list.text:
She ran well in the Satsuki Sho just before this.
Still, I can understand being on edge with the
Japanese Derby just ahead.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We have been standing and talking for quite a
while. I need to add 3 minutes and 36 seconds to
my jog.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I should get back to my exercise. Please be
careful on your way home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah, right. Good luck in tomorrow's race!

Curren Chan stares after Eishin Flash for quite
some time after she's run off.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go watch the Derby tomorrow. I... feel
like I have to.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think we're supposed to have the day off
tomorrow, but... do you mind?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Let's go to Tokyo Racecourse!
